ASBESTOS LAW AND MOTION, 503, DEFENDANT GORMAN-RUPP COMPANY'S MOTION FOR RELIEF FROM THE COURTS SEPTEMBER 29, 2016, ORDER REQUIRING DISCLOSURE OF INSURANCE INFORMATION AND ATTENDANCE CARRIER REPRESENTATIVES AT MSC - COUNSEL FOR MOVING PARTY DID NOT PROVIDE TIMELY NOTICE TO THE COURT TO REQUEST A HEARING, THEREFORE THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING: DEFENDANT THE GORMAN-RUPP COMPANY'S MOTION FOR RELIEF FROM THE COURT'S SEPTEMBER 29, 2016, ORDER REQUIRING DISCLOSURE OF INSURANCE INFORMATION AND ATTENDANCE OF CARRIER REPRESENTATIVES AT MSC IS DENIED. DEFENDANT SHALL ANTICIPATE THAT THIS TENTATIVE RULING WILL BE ADOPTED AND MUST DESIGNATE ONE CARRIER REPRESENTATIVE WHO POSSESSES FULL AND FINAL SETTLEMENT AUTHORITY TO BE PRESENT AT THE OCTOBER 18, 2016 MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE. ASBESTOS LAW AND MOTION, 503, DEFENDANT ARMSTRONG INTERNATIONAL, INC.'S JOINDER IN DEFENDANT GORMAN-RUPP COMPANYS MOTION FOR RELIEF OF NOTICE OF MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE REQUIRING DISCLOSURE OF INSURANCE INFORMATION - COUNSEL FOR MOVING PARTY DID NOT PROVIDE TIMELY NOTICE TO THE COURT TO REQUEST A HEARING, THEREFORE THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING: DEFENDANT ARMSTRONG INTERNATIONAL, INC.'S JOINDER IN THE GORMAN-RUPP COMPANY'S MOTION FOR RELIEF OF NOTICE OF MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE REQUIRING DISCLOSURE OF INSURANCE INFORMATION IS DENIED. Notice Motion For Relief From The Courts September 29, 2016, Order Requiring Disclosure Of Insurance Information And Attendance Carrier Representatives At Msc
Off Calendar Oct-18-2016 Denied
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
John A. Burke of BISHOP | BARRY (510-596-0888), appearing for defendant / moving party The Gorman-Rupp Company
Catherine E. Golden of LOW, BALL & LYNCH (415-981-6630), appearing for defendant / joining party Armstrong International, Inc.
Elizabeth R. Bain of FOLEY & MANSFIELD (510-590-9500), appearing for defendants Ferguson Enterprises, Inc. and Familian Corporation

RULING:
DEFENDANT GORMAN-RUPP COMPANY'S MOTION FOR RELIEF FROM THE COURTS SEPTEMBER 29, 2016, ORDER REQUIRING DISCLOSURE OF INSURANCE INFORMATION AND ATTENDANCE CARRIER REPRESENTATIVES AT MSC

Counsel for moving party did not provide timely notice to the Court to request a hearing, therefore the Court adopted its tentative ruling: Defendant The Gorman-Rupp Company's motion for relief from the Court's September 29, 2016, order requiring disclosure of insurance information and attendance of carrier representatives at MSC is denied. Defendant shall anticipate that this tentative ruling will be adopted and must designate one carrier representative who possesses full and final settlement authority to be present at the October 18, 2016 Mandatory Settlement Conference. Confidential disclosures are due to the court immediately following the October 18, 2016 hearing. Judge: Garrett L. Wong, Matter not reported (503/GLW)

Joinder In Defendant Gorman-Rupp Companys Motion For Relief Of Notice Of Mandatory Settlement Conference Requiring Disclosure Of Insurance Information
Off Calendar Oct-18-2016 Denied
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
John A. Burke of BISHOP | BARRY (510-596-0888), appearing for defendant / moving party The Gorman-Rupp Company
Catherine E. Golden of LOW, BALL & LYNCH (415-981-6630), appearing for defendant / joining party Armstrong International, Inc.
Elizabeth R. Bain of FOLEY & MANSFIELD (510-590-9500), appearing for defendants Ferguson Enterprises, Inc. and Familian Corporation

RULING:
DEFENDANT ARMSTRONG INTERNATIONAL, INC.'S JOINDER IN DEFENDANT GORMAN-RUPP COMPANYS MOTION FOR RELIEF OF NOTICE OF MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE REQUIRING DISCLOSURE OF INSURANCE INFORMATION

Counsel for moving party did not provide timely notice to the Court to request a hearing, therefore the Court adopted its tentative ruling: Defendant Armstrong International, Inc.'s joinder in The Gorman-Rupp Company's motion for relief of notice of mandatory settlement conference requiring disclosure of insurance information is denied. Defendant shall anticipate that this tentative ruling will be adopted and must designate one carrier representative who possesses full and final settlement authority to be present at the October 18, 2016 Mandatory Settlement Conference. Confidential disclosures are due to the court immediately following the October 18, 2016 hearing. Judge: Garrett L. Wong, Matter not reported (503/GLW)
